“子澄的谋略、智慧更是不在萧何以及张良之下。”

“有三位弟弟相助，汉室何愁不兴？”

李穆望着春光满面的刘备，目光幽幽。

如果没有记错的话，自己似乎是一个武将······

还是拥有西楚霸王项羽同款武力的顶级武将！！！

把我当谋臣使还很骄傲？

诸葛亮：“子澄之谋略，亮不如也。”

郭嘉：“世人皆称我为鬼才，殊不知在李子澄是神仙化凡，简称神人。”

李穆：“谢谢奉孝的称赞，但你才是神人。”

周瑜：“既生瑜，何生穆？！”

从此曹操求而不得的男人又多了一个，那就是李穆，李子澄。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/11750994ff4ea16ba7540809eb7166e7","author":"五维天道的世宗大王","author_id":"","book_id":"7591009420671208473","book_name":"三国：顶级武将，你当谋臣使？","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202010","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6814人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":272,"name":"历史脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=272&name=历史脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":67,"name":"三国","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=67&name=三国&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":497,"name":"武将","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=497&name=武将&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7591020824765661721","read_count":"6814","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"183563"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"90","tags":"历史脑洞,历史,三国,武将,系统,穿越,同人","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/adaa453c8c2cad9d3f1ce2d82c0ebd35~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779445654&x-signature=sIvY%2BfCvnMjNN%2F6OlA3fm4P8bD4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1918021910138263","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"25"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231827349CD4A2BC14B2F146DDBF"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"r
